UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Sojourn Properties, Inc is present.
Attorney, Erica Shepard for David Brillant is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Roger Grant is present.
Attorney, Melvin C Belli is appearing for the Defendant Limited Scope.

The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of March 25, 2013 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar
